patch.value: Server hangs/cryptic error when DATABASE_URL is unset

SYMPTOM: Starting pm-web without DATABASE_URL produced no output for several seconds, then a cryptic 'getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN pm-telemetry-postgres' DNS error. db.ts silently fell back to a hardcoded telemetry-specific host (pm-telemetry-postgres) with undefined credentials, and the failure only surfaced after the 5s pool connectionTimeout. REPRO: env -u DATABASE_URL node dist/server.js  (observed ~5s silent wait then DNS error stack). EXPECTED: a server that requires a DB should fail fast with a clear actionable message and exit non-zero. OBSERVED vs EXPECTED: cryptic delayed DNS error vs clear 'DATABASE_URL is not set' guidance. FIX: added assertDbConfigured() in db.ts (validates DATABASE_URL or POSTGRES_HOST+POSTGRES_DB, removed the pm-telemetry-postgres default), called at the top of server.ts before any DB use; also collapsed the schema-init catch to print err.message instead of a full stack. Now: no DATABASE_URL -> instant clear message + exit 1 (1s); unreachable DB -> clean one-line timeout error + exit 1.

Fixed: assertDbConfigured() in db.ts + fast-fail in server.ts. Verified: no DATABASE_URL -> instant clear message + exit 1; unreachable DB -> clean error + exit 1; good DB -> server runs and full API works.
